description: Perform a mesh independence study on a wind turbine blade using the project at /home/ga/Documents/projects/start_turbine.wpa. Conduct a BEM simulation at Wind Speed=10m/s, TSR=7, and Pitch=0 to determine the baseline Power Coefficient (Cp). Refine the blade discretization to at least 50 sections and repeat the simulation with the same parameters. Save the refined project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/refined_turbine.wpa and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/mesh_study_report.txt containing both the baseline and refined Cp values.
